name: Giant Forest Rat
description: A rat the size of a dog with razor-sharp teeth.
deathMessage: The Giant Forest Rat squeals and collapses!

name: Wild Boar
description: A tusked beast charging through the underbrush.
deathMessage: The Wild Boar crashes to the ground with a final snort!

name: Forest Bandit
description: A desperate outlaw hiding among the trees.
deathMessage: The Forest Bandit falls to his knees and begs for mercy!

name: Highway Robber
description: A skilled thief who preys on travelers.
deathMessage: The Highway Robber drops his stolen goods and flees!

name: Wolf Pack
description: A group of hungry wolves hunting as one.
deathMessage: The wolves scatter into the darkness, whimpering!

name: Plains Lion
description: A massive feline predator stalking the grasslands.
deathMessage: The Plains Lion lets out a final roar and falls!

name: Rogue Centaur
description: A half-man, half-horse warrior wielding a massive bow.
deathMessage: The Centaur rears up and crashes to the earth!

name: Sea Serpent
description: A massive snake-like creature rising from the waves.
deathMessage: The Sea Serpent sinks beneath the waves with a tremendous splash!

name: Cave Troll
description: A hulking beast with stone-like skin dwelling in darkness.
deathMessage: The Cave Troll crumbles into a pile of rubble!

name: Shadow Wyrm
description: A serpentine beast cloaked in living darkness.
deathMessage: The Shadow Wyrm dissolves into wisps of darkness!

name: Mountain Giant
description: A towering giant hurling boulders from the peaks.
deathMessage: The Mountain Giant tumbles down the mountainside!

name: Ancient Dragon
description: The most feared creature in all the realm. Few survive its wrath.
deathMessage: The Ancient Dragon lets out one final blast of flame and crashes to the earth!
